title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 357.070 - Fees of recorder of deeds
text:
357.070.  Fees of recorder of deeds. — The fees of the recorder of deeds for any service required by this chapter shall be the same as those now customarily appertaining to his office for similar services.
(RSMo 1939 § 14412) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 12754; 1919 § 10252
